zh.lifeSummary: 當Brunissende de FOIX於1270年出生在法國米迪-列內斯可明格斯時，她的父親Roger Bernard III De Foix27歲，母親Marguerite De Bearn25歲。她於1298年與Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand在法國阿利艾福瓦結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1339年享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Brunissende de FOIX于1270年出生在法国米迪-列內斯可明格斯时，她的父亲Roger Bernard III De Foix27岁，母亲Marguerite De Bearn25岁。她于1298年与Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand在法国阿利艾福瓦结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1339年享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: FOIX
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Dieter, Frieda, Guenter, Heinz, Lothar.
Americanized form of German Voit and of it Polish variant Fojt.

variants.name: Voit
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eberhard, Erwin, Fritz, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard.

en.lifeSummary: When Brunissende de FOIX was born in 1270, in Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, France, her father, Roger Bernard III De Foix, was 27 and her mother, Marguerite De Bearn, was 25. She married Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand in 1298, in Foix, Ariège, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1339, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Brunissende de FOIX est née en 1270, à Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Roger Bernard III De Foix, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marguerite De Bearn, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand en 1298, à Foix, Ariège, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1339, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Brunissende de FOIX 1270 in Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Bernard III De Foix 27 und ihre Mutter Marguerite De Bearn 25. Sie hat 1298 in Foix, Ariège, Frankreich Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1339 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Brunissende de FOIX è nata il nel 1270 nel Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, sua padre, Roger Bernard III De Foix, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Marguerite De Bearn, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand nel 1298, nel Foix, Ariège, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1339, all'età di 69 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Brunissende de FOIX(이)가 1270년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 코밍스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Bernard III De Foix(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite De Bearn(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1298년 프랑스 애리e지 포이스에서 Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1339년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Brunissende de FOIX nasceu em 1270, em Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Roger Bernard III De Foix, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite De Bearn, tinha 25 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Brunissende de FOIX родилась в 1270 г. в местности коммингесь, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Roger Bernard III De Foix было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite De Bearn, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand в 1298 г. в местности фоикс, ариeдж, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1339 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Brunissende de FOIX nació en 1270, en Comminges, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Roger Bernard III De Foix, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marguerite De Bearn, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand en 1298, en Foix, Ariège, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1339, a la edad de 69 años.
